message:
feat(types): make tools and agents required fields on AgentSpec

Make tools[] and agents[] required (non-optional) on AgentSpec. The YAML
loader derives them from capabilities using the "/" convention (names with
"/" are agent refs, without are tool names). The markdown loader already
set them explicitly. All 19 files that construct AgentSpec updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -129,6 +129,8 @@ export class GenomeMutationService {
 						system_prompt: mutation.system_prompt,
 						model: mutation.model,
 						capabilities: mutation.capabilities,
+						tools: mutation.capabilities.filter((c: string) => !c.includes("/")),
+						agents: mutation.capabilities.filter((c: string) => c.includes("/")),
 						constraints: { ...DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS, can_spawn: false },
 						tags: mutation.tags,
 						version: 1,
